title: ActionClassRegistry
description: Defines the catalog of action classes with payload schemas, evidence requirements, and risk metadata. Architecture Document Section 3.4.1.

payload_schema.description: JSON Schema for the proposed_payload in ActionProposals of this class.

items.description: Abstract evidence categories required for proposals of this class.

cad_fields_written.description: CAD fields that this action class writes. Empty for read-only actions.

critical_fields.description: Fields where low confidence triggers the uncertainty_critical_field predicate.

freshness_strategy.description: Data freshness enforcement mechanism. Not a governance operator; implementation mechanism for Bound on data currency.

rollback_semantics.description: If the action is reversible, defines how. Required for A >= A3 unless Checkpoint is present (Obligation 2).
